name: Tropical Paste
recipeIngredient: 1 1-inch Chunk Peeled Fresh Ginger, coarsely chopped
1 Small Fresh or Dried Hot Green or Red Chile (stemmed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the scallions, ginger, and chile in a blender or food processor.
2. Mince the ingredients until they are finely chopped.
3. Scrape down the sides of the container to ensure all ingredients are included.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: brown sugar, tamarind concentrate, lime juice, coarse salt, tomato paste, curry powder, and ground allspice.
5. Process everything together in the blender or food processor until a smooth paste forms.
6. Store the paste in an airtight jar in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
